title: Slovakian Pudding
description: A traditional Slovakian dessert made with pudding and silky ingredients.
instructions: In a small bowl, sprinkle gelatin over 1/4 cup cold water and let it sit for 5 minutes.
In a medium saucepan, combine pudding mix, milk, and sugar.
Whisk over medium heat until sugar dissolves and mixture comes to a boil.
Remove from heat and pour in gelatin mixture.
Whisk until gelatin is fully dissolved.
Strain mixture into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Refrigerate for at least 3 hours or until set.
Top with silky vanilla extract before serving.
